# External Review

This directory records the external reviewer feedback process for `zhoulifeng-skill`.

External reviewers may include:

- content creators
- developers
- reviewers familiar with Zhou Lifeng / 峰哥亡命天涯 content
- AI safety reviewers
- open-source maintainers

External feedback is useful for surfacing fidelity, usability, documentation, and safety concerns. It does not automatically change model status.

Candidate model promotion still requires evidence review, source verification, and explicit updates to the relevant research notes and `SKILL.md`. A reviewer saying “this feels right” is not enough to make a candidate model verified.

## Files

- `reviewer-invite.md`: invitation copy for reviewers.
- `feedback-form.md`: copyable feedback template.
- `feedback-log.csv`: structured log for received feedback.
- `reports/v0.8-external-review-report.md`: current v0.8 review status.

## Boundaries

Do not ask reviewers to provide:

- private chats
- private authorization materials
- private contact details
- unlicensed screenshots
- long transcripts or subtitles
- private information about real people

Reviewers should evaluate public materials only.
